ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each item (e.g., FDW58) */,
  "item_weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "item_visibility" REAL /* Visibility of the item (e.g., 0.00756484) */,
  "item_mrp" REAL /* Maximum retail price of the item */,
  "item_type" INTEGER /* Type of item (e.g., food, non-food) */,
  "item_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the item */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the item (e.g., fruits, vegetables, electronics) */,
  "item_supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "item_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "item_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the item was added to the system */,
  "item_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_type FOREIGN KEY ("item_type") REFERENCES item_types ("item_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type */,
  "item_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the item type (e.g., food, non-food) */,
  "item_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the item type */,
  "item_type_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image representing the item type */,
  "item_type_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the item type was added to the system */,
  "item_type_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the item type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlets" (
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlet */,
  "outlet_identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each outlet (e.g., OUT049) */,
  "outlet_location_type" INTEGER /* Location type of the outlet (e.g., tier 1, tier 2) */,
  "outlet_size" INTEGER /* Size of the outlet (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "outlet_name" TEXT /* Name of the outlet */,
  "outlet_address" TEXT /* Address of the outlet */,
  "outlet_city" TEXT /* City where the outlet is located */,
  "outlet_state" TEXT /* State where the outlet is located */,
  "outlet_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the outlet */,
  "outlet_country" TEXT /* Country where the outlet is located */,
  "outlet_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the outlet */,
  "outlet_email" TEXT /* Email address for the outlet */,
  "outlet_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the outlet */,
  "outlet_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the outlet was added to the system */,
  "outlet_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the outlet was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item sold */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet where the sale was made */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Amount of the sale */,
  "sale_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "sale_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "sale_net_amount" REAL /* Net amount after discount */,
  "sale_payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the sale (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "sale_customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sale_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sale was recorded */,
  "sale_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sale was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in inventory */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet where the inventory is located */,
  "inventory_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory entry */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level */,
  "inventory_reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "inventory_reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the reorder level */,
  "inventory_last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "inventory_supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the item */,
  "inventory_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory entry was added */,
  "inventory_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, sales analyst, inventory manager) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role (to reference a roles table) */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was added to the system */,
  "user_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the supplier */,
  "supplier_email" TEXT /* Email address for the supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is located */,
  "supplier_state" TEXT /* State where the supplier is located */,
  "supplier_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "supplier_country" TEXT /* Country where the supplier is located */,
  "supplier_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the supplier was added to the system */,
  "supplier_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the supplier was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was added to the system */,
  "role_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
